subject: New Request: Go Developer
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: PixelForge
ROLE: Senior Go Developer
START: ASAP
DURATION: 12 months
LOCATION: Stockholm / hybrid
RATE: 925 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Go, AWS and MySQL.

Key requirements:
• Go
• AWS
• MySQL

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Maria Svensson
Senior Talent Manager
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 70 567 89 01
